sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105213" key="trisdei/laios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐσ-δείλαιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105213.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρισάθλιος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.737</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
